'''thadacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadrunner|roadrunner]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-d-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadrunner|roadrunner]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thadacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thædæchæth|thædæchæth]] || [[word:thædæchæj|thædæchæj]] || [[word:thædæchæsh|thædæchæsh]] || [[word:thædæchæ|thædæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thadadachath|thadadachath]] || [[word:thadadachaj|thadadachaj]] || [[word:thadadachash|thadadachash]] || [[word:thadadacha|thadadacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadachath|thadachath]] || [[word:thadachaj|thadachaj]] || [[word:thadachash|thadachash]] || [[word:thadacha|thadacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadafchath|thadafchath]] || [[word:thadafchaj|thadafchaj]] || [[word:thadafchash|thadafchash]] || [[word:thadafchaf|thadafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thadachatha|thadachatha]] || [[word:thadachaja|thadachaja]] || [[word:thadachasha|thadachasha]] || [[word:thadachaka|thadachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thadachath|thadachath]] || [[word:thadachaj|thadachaj]] || [[word:thadachash|thadachash]] || [[word:thadacha|thadacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thadachathal|thadachathal]] || [[word:thadachajal|thadachajal]] || [[word:thadachashal|thadachashal]] || [[word:thadachakal|thadachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thadachathatha|thadachathatha]] || [[word:thadachajaja|thadachajaja]] || [[word:thadachashasha|thadachashasha]] || [[word:thadachaka|thadachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thadachathan|thadachathan]] || [[word:thadachajan|thadachajan]] || [[word:thadachashan|thadachashan]] || [[word:thadachakan|thadachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thadachathaoro|thadachathaoro]] || [[word:thadachajaoro|thadachajaoro]] || [[word:thadachashaoro|thadachashaoro]] || [[word:thadachakaoro|thadachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
